description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, slightly bulging body constructed from vertical wooden staves. The wood is textured with visible grain patterns, knots, and some dark stains, giving it a weathered, rustic appearance. Two wide, dark metal hoops encircle the barrel near the top and bottom, providing structural reinforcement and a contrasting industrial touch. The top surface is flat and made of the same wood, with faint circular markings and some subtle text or branding visible. Scattered stains and smudges on the wood suggest prior use, possibly for storing liquids or goods. The overall craftsmanship and materials indicate it is designed for durability and practical use in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops, visible wood grain, stains, and a flat wooden top, suggesting prior use and durability.
description_view_0: This view highlights a prominent handprint stain and wood grain details on the barrel's side, with both metal hoops clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle shows more subtle stains and a faint text or branding on the top, with the wood grain and metal hoops still prominent.
description_view_2: This side displays fewer stains, focusing on the clean wood texture and the secure fit of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: This view features another handprint stain and more pronounced wood knots, with the top branding partially visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
